# Project Context
- **Repo:** esN2k/esN2k-Portfolio
- **Live URL:** https://esn2k.engineer
- **Stack:** Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS, GitHub Pages
- **Languages:** EN/TR bilingual (switcher in script.js)
- **Goal:** Design overhaul — Bento-grid layout, Glassmorphism UI, premium typography
- **SEO:** sitemap.xml and robots.txt must stay accurate, all URLs use esn2k.engineer
- **Constraint:** No frameworks (React/Vue etc.), pure vanilla JS only
- **Active branch:** design/overhaul-v2
- **NEVER commit directly to master**
- **GitHub Pages serves from master** — only merge after visual QA
